goal: Ship v7.7 as adoption-grade v7 runtime by making fresh-project adoption proof produce bounded v7 evidence.
risk: AOF could claim adoption readiness from docs, examples, or artifact count instead of a fresh runtime evidence chain.
loss_boundary: No v7.7 release claim without AP-007 through AP-011, release-state audit integration, and not-proven adoption boundaries.
stop_conditions: stop if AP-007 through AP-011 fail
stop if adoption is overclaimed as market validation
